name: French Apple Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 14 oz can Eagle Brand sweetened milk
3 medium apples, pared, cored, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs and add the sweetened milk, apples, hot water, butter, cinnamon, and vanilla. Stir in the bread cubes and raisins until everything is moistened well.
3. Pour the mixture into a buttered 9-inch square baking dish.
4. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Allow to cool. Serve warm with ice cream. Refrigerate any leftovers.
